ddls:
CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "ensemble_id" TEXT /* Ensemble ID of the protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the protein sequence */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species from which the protein is derived */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the protein data was first added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the protein data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peptide_hits" (
  "hit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peptide hit entry */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the peptide hit belongs to */,
  "fovea_avg_pephits" REAL /* Average peptide hits in the fovea region */,
  "macula_avg_pephits" REAL /* Average peptide hits in the macula region */,
  "periphery_avg_pephits" REAL /* Average peptide hits in the periphery region */,
  "hit_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the peptide hit */,
  "hit_length" INTEGER /* Length of the peptide hit */,
  "hit_score" REAL /* Score indicating the confidence or quality of the peptide hit */,
  "hit_position" INTEGER /* Position of the peptide hit within the protein sequence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the peptide hit data was first added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the peptide hit data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peptide_hits_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the protein */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the protein was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access request was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
